title: Shefa 300 Premium White Reusable Set - 100 Spoon, 100 Fork, 100 Knife - Reusable & Washable, Heavy Duty Cutlery, 6" Long Tablespoon - Ideal for Birthday, Parties, Camping, Catering
features: COMPLETE SET: 300-piece reusable cutlery set includes 100 spoons, 100 forks, and 100 knives in classic white colour, perfect for large gatherings
DURABLE DESIGN: Heavy-duty plastic construction ensures these utensils can withstand regular use and washing for multiple occasions
PRACTICAL SIZE: Each piece measures 14.5 cm in length, providing comfortable handling for adults whilst dining
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for birthday parties, outdoor events, camping trips, catering services, and other large-scale gatherings
REUSABLE VALUE: Washable and reusable design offers a cost-effective alternative to disposable cutlery whilst maintaining durability
description: Elevate your next event with this comprehensive 300-piece white reusable cutlery set, perfect for parties, catering, camping, and special occasions. The set includes 100 each of spoons, forks, and knives, all crafted from durable plastic material that can be washed and reused. Each utensil measures 14.5 cm in length, providing comfortable handling for your guests. The heavy-duty construction ensures these utensils won't bend or break during use, making them reliable for serving both hot and cold dishes. The classic white colour adds a touch of elegance to any table setting whilst maintaining a professional appearance. These versatile utensils are ideal for birthday celebrations, outdoor gatherings, café service, or large-scale catering events. The reusable nature of these utensils makes them a practical choice for regular use, offering both convenience and durability. Keep a set handy for impromptu gatherings or planned events where quality tableware is essential.
